summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agricultural Water Bill Tracker after backend refactoring to modular routes. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages (Dashboard, Consumers, Bills, Payments, SMS) all load correctly and display data from paginated API responses.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from monolithic server.py to modular routes (routes/auth.py, consumers.py, bills.py, payments.py). All GET endpoints return paginated responses {items, total, skip, limit, has_more}. Frontend handles paginated format with `data.items || data` fallback. All CRUD operations tested and working. SMS endpoint is MOCKED - only logs messages, uses WhatsApp deep-links on frontend.

backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@waterbill.com / admin123 - cookie auth works
GET /api/auth/me returns user info with cookie auth
GET /api/consumers returns paginated format {items, total, skip, limit, has_more}
GET /api/bills returns paginated format {items, total, skip, limit, has_more}
POST /api/bills creates a bill with correct land+rate calculation
GET /api/payments returns paginated format {items, total, skip, limit, has_more}
POST /api/payments creates a payment and updates bill due/paid
frontend: Login flow - login and see dashboard with stats
Dashboard page - shows consumers count, bills count, total amount, paid, due
Consumers page - shows consumers list from paginated response (3 consumers)
Bills page - shows bills list from paginated response (2 bills)
Payments page - shows payments list from paginated response (6 payments)
SMS page - shows consumer select, message input, templates
All navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Consumers, Bills, Payments)
Add/Edit/Delete buttons present on all CRUD pages
Dialog forms have proper data-testid attributes

mocked_apis.POST /api/sms/send: Only logs messages to console, uses WhatsApp deep-links on frontend for actual messaging
